1693160.name: Zone B Korosu
1693160.description:
An apocalypse that won't stop escalating.

Zone B Korosu is a narrative-driven action epic where characters, perspectives, and gameplay evolve alongside the story.

Hold onto your shotgun shells and expect things to go from 'normal day at work' to 'will we survive the night?' 

Key Features:

  • Mix of fast-paced action sequences and down-tempo chillzones

  • Multiple character perspectives across the campaign

  • Evolving playstyles; one continuous story

  • World of NPCs to interact with...or not!

  • Retro-inspired pixel art style

  • Digestible playtime (2-4 hrs)

  • High-energy soundtrack
1693160.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
